examples: The trawler had sailed from the port of Zeebrugge.
A big rescue operation has been launched for a trawler missing in the North Atlantic.
Take the case of the Alaska Ranger, a 184-foot trawler that sank in the Bering Sea in 2008.
The 15m (49.2ft) prawn trawler Amethyst hit rocks off the Point of Sleat at about 05:00.
The Mallaig lifeboat crew freed the trawler from the rocks and towed it to Mallaig harbour.
